description_long: This is a high-top sneaker with a predominantly black canvas upper, accented by white stitching and a white rubber toe cap. The shoe features a prominent white star on the tongue and two additional stars on the heel, as well as a circular emblem with a stylized 'S' on the outer ankle. The laces are white and threaded in a standard criss-cross pattern through metallic eyelets, with one lace partially untied. The midsole is white with a thin red stripe running along its length, and the outsole displays a geometric tread pattern for grip. The interior lining appears to be light gray, and the overall condition of the shoe is clean and unworn.
description: A black high-top sneaker with white accents, star motifs, and a circular emblem, featuring white laces and a red-striped sole. The shoe appears new and well-constructed.
description_view_0: Front view shows the white star on the tongue, criss-cross lacing, and the white toe cap.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the circular 'S' emblem, white stitching, and the red-striped midsole.
description_view_2: Rear view displays two black stars on the heel and the vertical white stitching up the back.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left but without the emblem, showing the clean black canvas and lacing.
attribute_logo: Circular 'S' emblem on the outer ankle in white; white star on the tongue; two black stars on the heel.
